Community Rules
Network Unity · Please read carefully
  1. 01Don't share personal information with other users
  2. 02Don't share your social media accounts or handles
  3. 03No bypassing the word filters — keep it clean
  4. 04No harassing or taunting staff members
  5. 05Treat everyone with respect at all times
  6. 06No NSFW content or conversations
  7. 07No begging other users or staff for coins, items, or staff roles
  8. 08You must be 13 years of age or older to use this platform
Please read the rules… (3)
Network Unity
Connect · Chat · Compete
⚠️ On 5/8/26, all data was reset. If you have not already created a new account, please do so now.
🏆
Leaderboard
Ranked by Most Messages

Update Log

v2.9 - Latest Updates:
• DM load lag significantly reduced — no more Loading flash
• renderInboxDMList and updateDMList debounced to prevent burst re-renders
• renderChatText output cached — emoji/regex parsing skipped for seen messages
• Scroll-to-bottom synced to paint frame via requestAnimationFrame
• Removed redundant DM list re-render on every received message

v2.8 - Previous Updates:
• New emoji button
• Bug report form in tools
• Status shows next to your name in chat
• Typing indicator in gc's and dm's
• Typing indicator in public chat moved to next to the tools button
• Notifications for Announcements
• Changed order of the tools.

v2.7 - Previous Updates:
• @mention autocomplete — type @ to see online users and tab to complete
• Custom status — set AFK, Busy, Gaming, or any custom text
• Status shows next to your name in chat
• Full profile pages — bio, stats, badges, join date, clickable from any message
• Edit your own bio from your profile
• Account deletion — permanently remove your account from settings
• Reactions now fully persist to Firebase (survive page refresh)
• Warn history — mods can view full warn log per user with timestamps
• Auto-timeout on 3 warns — 10 minute timeout applied automatically
• Mod action log — full history of every ban, timeout, warn and mute
• Filter mod log by action type

v2.5 - Previous Updates:
• Messages now delete in real time for everyone
• Message edits now update live for everyone
• You can now edit your own messages
• Group chats added — create groups, invite friends, and chat together
• Get notified when someone adds you to a group chat
• Leaderboard now ranks by message count

v2.4 - Previous Updates:
• React feature added!
• The typing indicator has been moved to the side of the chat box.
• Leaderboad fixed.
•Changed placement of the pinned message.

v2.3 - Previous Updates:
• Friends list now saves to Firebase (persistent across devices)
• DM messages now saved to Firebase permanently
• Toast notifications for new DMs, friend requests, and @mentions
• All floating panels are now draggable
• Angel role replaced with Developer role (blue badge)
• Friend request system — send and accept requests
• DM unread message indicators

v2.2 - Previous Updates:
• Reply messages now highlighted in gold
• Pinned messages have a new cleaner look
• Leaderboard XP bars are now white
• Announcements now show oldest to newest (Discord-style)
• Fixed leaderboard podium
• Added Emoji Guide in the tools menu
• Typing indicator no longer flashes
• Multiple people typing shown at once

v2.1 - Previous Updates:
• Username limit increased to 12 characters
• Character limit set to 54 characters
• Added emoji support
• Added friends feature
• Added private DMs
• Added leaderboard & XP system
• Added rank badges
• Added announcement panels
• Added typing indicator
• Added reply & edit support
• Added message reporting

This is how your bio will look to everyone.
📦
Preset Storage Expansion
Increase your saved preset slots for nametag colors and profile frames. Each purchase adds +5 slots to both. Stacks up to 5 times (max 35 slots each). Cost increases by 25,000 🪙 per level: 25k → 50k → 75k → 100k → 125k.
👗
Outfit Storage Expansion
Increase how many saved outfits you can store in the Wardrobe. Each purchase adds +4 outfit slots. Stacks up to 5 times (max 28 slots). Cost increases by 25,000 🪙 per level: 25k → 50k → 75k → 100k → 125k.

🎨 Equipped Cosmetics

🎤 Create Voice Room

🔒 Password Required

Welcome to Network Unity
💬 Chatting
Channels — Pick a room from the left rail. Each channel has its own topic and vibe.
DMs & Group Chats — Click the button in the top-left of the server rail to open your inbox. From there, click a friend to DM them or hit New GC to start a group chat.
Images & GIFs — Sending images and GIFs must be unlocked from the Blackmarket first. Then use the 📎 button or paste (Ctrl+V) to attach.
First message cooldown — There’s a short wait before your first message. This is to reduce the risk of raids — it’ll pass quickly!
Every message earns +1 XP. Each level needs level × 10 XP to advance (Level 1 = 10 XP, Level 2 = 20 XP, and so on).
🥉 Lv 1–4 Newcomer ranks
⭐ Lv 5 Unlocks economy
🥈 Lv 10–24 Mid-tier ranks
👑 Lv 25+ Elite & Prestige
Earn coins — Chat, complete daily quests, level up, and log in each day to earn coins.
Blackmarket — Spend coins on cosmetics, loot crates, image and GIF sending, and more.
Careers & Invest — Pick a career to earn passive income, or invest your coins for returns.
Workshop — Buy and sell custom cosmetics made by the community.
Season Pass — Unlock premium rewards and bonuses for the current season.
Wardrobe — Equip name colours, chat frames, name tags, and highlight styles from your inventory.
Profile PFP & Banner — Unlock a custom profile picture and banner (available at Level 5).
Loot Crates — Roll for random cosmetics that go straight into your wardrobe.
• Keep it respectful — no harassment, slurs, or spam
• Staff badges (MOD, HEADMOD, DEV, OWNER) mark the team
• Check Quests daily for bonus XP and coin rewards
